title: Star Wars: Early Learning Activity Center
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{VideoGame |image=[[File:G_sw_lrn_7041.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Early Learning
Activity Center'' |developer=[[Lucas Learning]] |publisher=[[Lucas Learning]] |release date=[[August 2]], [[2000]]{{WebCite|url=https://publicrecords.copyright.gov/detailed-record/voyager_11877320|text=Star Wars Early Learning Activity Center.|work=the [[Wikipedia:United States Copyright Office|U.S. Copyright Office Public Records System]]|archivedate=20251007092142}} |closed= |upc= |engine= |genre=Learning |modes= |ratings=Everyone (E) |platforms=[[Wikipedia:Personal computer|Personal computer]] |series= |basegame= |expansions= |director= |producer= |designer= |programmer= |artist= |writer= |composer= |timeline= |prev= |next= }} '''''Star Wars: Early Learning Activity Center''''' was a game released in [[2000]] by [[Lucas Learning]]. It was intended for children ages 4 to 6, and featured young [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Queen Amidala]] and other characters from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. {{Game-stub}} ==Credits== *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] ... [[Jake Lloyd]] *[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar]] ... [[Ahmed Best]] *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Queen Amidala]] .... [[Grey Griffin|Grey DeLisle]] *[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]] ... [[Kevin Michael Richardson]] *Slingshot Announcer ... [[Denny Delk]] *Treasure Announcer ... Grey DeLisle *DJ ...
